title: AMC Inthlanpui 2026 ah tluang taka vote thlak zawh fel a ni
content:
229/2026-2027

AIZAWL: 21st April,2026:Boruak muanawm tak hnuaiah tukin zing dar 7:00 atang khan AMC Inthlanpui 2026 atan vote thlak tan a ni a. Tlai dar 5:00 thleng vote thlak hun hi hawn niin  tluang taka vote thlak hi zawhfel a ni. Vote tla zat hi a vaiin 1,46,719; Mipa 66,415 leh hmeichhia 80,304 a ni.  Vote tlak dan kimchang chu sec.mizoram.gov.in/page/ge-to-amc-2026-poll-day-report-results atang hian en theih a ni.

AMC hnuaiah hian Ward 19 awmin, AMC Inthlanpui 2026 ah hian INC, MNF leh ZPM te chuan Ward 19-ah candidate an nei vek a; BJP erawh chuan Ward 11-ah candidate an nei thung. Candidate te hi an vaiin 68, hmeichhia- 27 leh mipa- 41 an ni a. Ward 6, heng: Ward –II,IV,V,XI,XII leh XVII te hi hmeichhe tana reserved ward an ni. AMC hnuaiah hian Local Council 89 leh Polling Station 264 a awm mek a. AMC Inthlanpui 2026-ah hian Electronic Voting Machine hman niin VVPAT (Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail) erawh hman a ni lo.

Tun tum inthlanpuia hman tak Electoral Roll-ah hian voter awm zat chu hmeichhia – 1,29,650 leh Mipa – 1,10,335 an ni a, an vaiin voter hi 2,39,985 an awm a, mipa aia hmeichhia an tamna chu 19,315 a ni.  Voter tamna ber Ward hi WARD XVIII niin, voter  18,906 an awm a. A tlemna ber Ward hi WARD VIII niin, voters  7975 an awm thung.

Polling station pan theilo kum upa te, damlo natna khirh bik nei te leh pianphunga rualbanlo te tana vote thlak theihna tura ruahman, Home Voting chu ni 13.4.2026 (Thawhtanni) atanga ni 16.4.2026 (Ningani) thleng  khan kalpui a ni a, vote tla 2768 (93.71%) a awm a ni.

AMC Inthlanpui 2026 hi felfai, thianghlim leh langtlang taka kalpui a nih theih nan, Polling Station tina hman tur EVM  leh vote thlak buaipuitu tur polling personnel te hi computer hmanga 1st, 2nd leh 3rd Randomization kaltlanga thlanchhuah, thliarhran leh semdarh (Randomize) an ni. Vote thlak zawhah EVM te hi General Observer te leh Political Party aiawhte hriatpuina hnuaiah DC Office Strong Room-ah dahluh leh vek an ni ang.

AMC Inthlanpui 2026 result hi April 27, 2026 (Thawhtanni) zing dar 8:00 atanga chhiar tan tura ruahman a ni a.  Re-Poll ngai a awm a nih chuan April ni 23, 2026 (Ningani) zing dar 7:00 atanga tlai dar 5:00 chhungin Re-Poll neih a ni ang.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DC IN THINGDAWL, KAWNPUI LEH MUALVUM A SAWRKAR HMUN PAWIMAWH TE A TLAWH
content:
228/2026-2027

Kolasib, 21st April, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Thingdawl, Kawnpui leh Mualvum-a sawrkar hmun pawimawh hrang hrangte tlawhin, hmasawnna tur leh mamawh awm te a hmunah a enfiah.

DC hian Thingdawl Nursing School tlawh hmasa berin, Pi Laltanpuii, Principal leh thawktuten lo dawngsawngin an mamawh hrang hrangte an lo thlen a . National Highway 4-lane laih mekin school ram a rawn khawih tel dawn avangin zirlai hmeichhia hlir awmna a nih angin an himna (security) kawngah ngaihtuahawm a nih theih thu leh, school campus hungna (fencing) tha an mamawh zia an lo thlen a. District Development plan tharah rooftop solar panel vuah tura hmalakpui turin DC hi an ngen bawk a ni.

Thingdawl Nursing School hi tunah hian ANM zirna niin, sawrkar laipuiin Nursing College (BSc Nursing) a hlankai (upgrade) a remtih tawh thu leh, infrastructure siam dan tur estimate pawh peihfel tawh a nih thu tarlan a ni a. PWD in hma la mekin AMC inthlan zawh lamah tender kalpui a nih tur thu sawi lan a ni bawk. DC chuan Nursing School mamawhte hi theih anga lo ngaihven zui a tum thu a sawi.

Thingdawl Nursing School tlawh zawh hian Dr. R Lalthlamuana, CMO Koalsib hovin National Highway kawng laitu (construction camp) te tlawhin thosilen 75 an sem a. Kolasib District chu malaria natna tlemna hmun (low malaria zone) a nih angin, hnathawktute chu malaria laka him tura inveng uluk turin an chah a ni.

DC hian Kawnpui Primary Health Centre (PHC) a tlawh chhunzawm a. Kawnpui PHC-ah hian tun dinhmunah Doctor pakhat, Nurse panga, Dental Surgeon pakhat leh staff dangte an awm mek a. An mamawh hrang hrang - dental chair, dental X-ray machine bakah, damlo khum hman lai te chu a hlui tawh avangin a thar an mamawh thu te, damdawi in hungna (fencing) leh thawktu indaihloh thu, a bikin Group-D mamawh a nih thu te DC hnenah hian an lo thlen a ni.

Kawnpui SDO (Civil) Office tlawh chhunzawmin, SDO leh thawktute nen office thuamthat dan tur leh tihchangtlun theih dan tur te sawiho bawk.

Hemi hnu hian Mualvum-a 1st IR Battalion Headquarters tlawh lehin, Commandant leh a naute'n an lo dawngsawng a. Battalion hmuna security, infrastructure leh hmasawnna tur tlangpui te an sawi ho nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiina  DC in Kolasib a Sawrkar hmun hrang hrang a tlawhna ah hian Chief Medical Officer, Addl. SP, SDO (Civil) Kawnpui leh District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO) Kolasib ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial SP in Dt. 21.04.26 (Tuesday) - Dt. 25.04.26 (Thursday) thleng Kawng siamthat a nih dawn vangin Road Block thupek a chhuah.
content:
227/2026-2027

Hnahthial, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 21:Hnahthial Superintendent of Police Pu Shivam Siddharth chuanHnahthial atanga Denlung panna Approach road Pu V.L Zuidika In, Electric veng atanga Hnahthial By-Pass junction Denlung Peng, Electric Veng, kawng chu siam anih dawn avangin Dt. 21.04.26 (Tuesday) - Dt. 25.04.26 (Thursday) thleng Road Block thupek a chhuah.

NOTIFICATION

Hnahthial atanga Denlung panna Approach road Pu V.L Zuidika In, Electric veng atanga Hnahthial By-Pass junction Denlung Peng, Electric Veng, Hnahthial hi siam a ni dawn a. Sub-Divisional Officer, PWD hnen atanga ziaka Road block dilna kan hmuh ang leh helai kawng siamtuten tha tak leh chak zawka hna an thawh theih nan Gov't of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF, Dt.27.05.2020 in MV Act Sec 115 &117 hmanga lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siam thei tura thuneihna min pek angin, Dt.21.04.2026 (Tuesday) atanga Dt.25.11.2026 (Saturday) thlengin helai kawngah hian lirthei eng chi mah tlan phal loh (Road Block) a ni tih thupek ka chhuah e.

Road block lo diltu hian helai hmunah hian road block a ni tih mipuiten an hriat theih nan notice/sign board an tar tur a ni ang.

He thupek hian khuarel chhiatna, kangmei leh emergency kaihhnawiha duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bika Police leh Magistrate duty te chetvelna a huam lovang.

Sd/-

(SHIVAM SIDDHARTH) IPS

Superintendent of Police

Hnahthial District: Mizoram

Attachment

title: Lungleiah LMC hnuaia Municipal Sanitation Committee an ṭhu khawm
content:
226/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 21:Vawiin khan Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) hnuaia Municipal Sanitation Committee (MSC) chu an Chairman, LMC Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma kaihhruaiin BoC Meeting Hall, Convention Centre, Lungleiah an ṭhu khawm.

Municipal Sanitation Committee Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma chuan member kal khawmte lawmna thu sawiin, LMC huam chhunga faina kawnga hma laknaah hmasawnna a awm zel theih nan member-te chu ngaihtuahna seng turin a sawm a. Lunglei khawpui chu Swachh Survekshan 2024–2025-ah India rama faina lama hmabak nei eng berte zinga mi, "Promising Swachh Shehar of Mizoram"-ah thlan a nih thu tar langin, LMC leh mipuite thawh honain Lunglei khawpui chuan faina lamah hma a sawn zel a beisei thu a sawi.

He ṭhut khawmah hian LMC Councillor Pu Vanlalliana Pachuau bakah, LMC, UD&PA, PWD, P&E leh I&PR official-te, Local Council Association Lunglei, YMA Sub-Headquarters Lunglei, MHIP Sub-Headquarters Lunglei leh MJA Lunglei District ai awhte an tel a. LMC Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Pu Lalhmansanga chuan thu ngaihtuah tura chhawp chhuahte sawi fiahin, sawi ho zui a ni.

March ni 24, 2026-a LMC BoC ṭhu khawmin a lo rel tawh, LMC huam chhunga fai intihsiak kalpui dan tur sawi ho a ni a. LMC hnuaia local council 24 chu huang (category) hnihah ṭhenin, fai inelna hi kum tluana kalpui ni se, tih a ni a. Fai endikna tur tehfung duang turin LMC CEO, Secretary leh DUDO te ruat niin, endiktu atan Clean Lunglei te sawm ni se, tih a ni a. Fai intihsiakna pual hian LMC BoC chuan cheng nuai 5 ruahmanin, lawmman zat tur, lawmman sem hun tur, a endik hun tur leh ṭul dang chu MSC ṭhut khawm lehpeka ngaihtuah ho atan dah a ni.

LMC hotute aṭangin Lunglei khawpui chhunga bawlhhlawh khawn leh paih kalpui dan ngaihthlak niin, veng 18-in anmahnia bawlhhlawh khawn leh paih an buaipui laiin, LMC-in lirthei tira bawlhhlawh a khawnna veng paruk an la awm thu tar lan a ni a. Bawlhhlawh lak khawm leh a man khawn chungchanga ruahmanna ṭha zawk a awm theih dan tur te, bawlhhlawh khawn sa paih chungchangah a paihna hmun ruahmanah chauh paih tura fimkhur leh felfai zawka hma lak dan tur te sawi ho niin, LMC hotute'n a ṭul angin lo bawhzui se, tih a ni.

He hunah hian bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna tur, Lunglei Solid Waste Management Centre (SWMC)-I sak mek chu hman theiha peih fel thuai beisei a nih thu te, khawl pawimawh hrang hrangte chah mek a nih thu leh bawlhhlawh chhek khawm sate pawh sawngbawl mek a nih thu te tar lan a ni a. SWMC-I chu ṭangkai tak leh a nih dan tur taka hman a nih theih nan mipuite lo inbuatsaih lawk dan tur leh mipuite inzirtirna kalpui dan tur te sawi ho a ni a. SWMC-I-ah chuan bawlhhlawh ṭawih thei leh ṭawih thei lo thliar hran a, a hranga sawngbawl a nih tawh dawn thu tar lan niin, chumi atan chuan tun aṭangin mipuite'n mahni ina bawlhhlawh ṭawih thei leh ṭawih thei lo thliar hran chu lo kalpui lawk a pawimawh thu te, huan leh hmunhma remchang neite chuan bawlhhlawh ṭawih thei bik chu lei ṭha atan compost pit siama mahnia thehthang a pawimawh thu te sawi lan a ni bawk.

LMC Municipal Sanitation Committee chuan faina leh thianghlimna kawnga Lungleiin hma a sawn zel theih nan Lunglei mipuite chu mahni in leh a vel leh khawpui vawn fai kawngah te, bawlhhlawh thliar hran kawngah leh bawlhhlawh thehthang kawngah te ṭan la zel turin a ngen.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH RUIHHLO HAL RAL
content:
225/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 21st April 2026:Vawiin khan Champhai Police te'n ruihhlo cheng vaibelchhe 465 (₹465 crore) chuang hu an man chu vawiin khan Pu Mohammad Aaquib, District Bawrhsap chuan District Hospital Complex-ah a halral.

Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan thu sawiin, nikumah khan cheng vaibelchhe 117 (₹117 cr.) chuang hu ruihhlo halral a nih tawh thu leh kuminah hmasawnna ropui tak Champhai Police te'n neia cheng vaibelchhe 465 chuang lai halral a ni leh tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Home Minister hmalakna a Operation Jericho kalpui a ni chuan kawng tam takah awmzia a neih thu a sawi a, hun lo kal zelah heng ruihhlo te titlem zel tura chawl lova thawh zel a tul thu leh thalaite'n ruihhlo an khawih lohna tura nasa zawka zirtirna pek zel a tul thu a sawi. Champhai thalaite hian infiamna kawngah theihna sang tak an neih thu a sawi a, infiamna bakah zirna kawng leh kawng hrang hranga theihna an neihte thalaite'n an boh bo mai lohna turin thalaiten ruihhlo an khawih loh a tul thu sawiin, thalai ruihhlo khawihte chuan anmahni nun an tihchhiat bakah an chhungte thlengin an tibuai thin, a ti.

Ruihhlo bakah a tawlh ruknaa inhmahnawihte man chhuah zel kawngah tang ho zel turin kalkhawmte a chah a, khualzinte hriat tan mek Champhai hi a mawina hmu duha lo kal ten a ni lo lam an hriat lohna tura ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawp chhuah zel a tul thu a sawi a, ruihhlo hei zar man a nih theihna tura Champhai SP leh a naute thawhrimna fakawm a tih thu sawiin an kalzelna turah duhsakna a hlan a, ruihhlo hi a halral a ni.

He hun hi Pu Victor Zothansanga, Addl. SP Champhai chuan kaihruaiin ruihhlo man a nih dan kawng hrang hrang a tarlang a, ruihhlo man a nih theihna tura Police te thawhrimna leh Police te puia an tha tichak thintute chungah lawmthu a sawi a, Pu Lokeshwaran R, District SP chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi ve bawk.

Vawiina ruihhlo halral takte hi Champhai Police te'n hmun hrang hranga an man, District Court-in halral tura phalna a pek tawh te an ni. Kum 2025, March thla atanga October 2025 chhunga man te niin ND&PS Act tlawhchhana thubuai 99 ziahluh te an ni. Hemi hun chhung hian Heroin Kg 35.852 a rit, cheng vaibelchhe 71, nuaih 70 leh sing 4 hu (₹71.70 cr), Methamphetamine Kg 490.896 a rit, cheng vaibelchhe 392 nuaih 71 sing 8 leh sang 8 hu (₹392.71 cr) leh Alprazolam Kg 4.740 a rit, cheng nuaih 94 leh sing 8 (₹94.8 lakhs) man hu a ni a, a vai hian cheng vaibelchhe 465 nuaih 36 sing 8 leh sang 8 hu man a ni.

Kum 2025 chhung khan Champhai Police te chuan ND&PS Act. tlawhchhanin thubuai 147 an ziak lut a, hemi kaihhnawihah hian mihring 260 man niin an zingah hian ramdang mi (Myanmar) 58 man tel an ni bawk. Kum 2025 chhung khan Heroin Kg 38.477, Methamphetamine Kg 622.4, Crystal Methamphetamine Kg 5.169, Caffeine Kg 3000, Alprazolam Kg 4.470 leh Corex Gram 1.6 te an man a, kum 2026 January ni 1 atanga April ni 20, 2026 chhung khan ND&PS Act. tlawhchhanin thubuai 47 an ziak kut a, mihring 76 man niin an zingah hian ramdang mi (Myanmar) 22 man tel an ni bawk. Kum 2026, January ni 1 atanga April ni 20, 2026 chhung hian Heroin Kg 8.266, Methamphetamine Kg 76.245 leh Crystal Methamphetamine Kg 10.259 te an man a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE SPORTS COUNCIL GOLDEN JUBILEE URHSUN TAKA LAWM A NI
content:
224/2026-2027

Aizawl, 21st April, 2026 :Mizoram State Sports Council (MSSC) kum 50-na Golden Jubilee chu nimin (April ni 20, 2026) khan R. Dengthuama Hall, Mualpuiah urhsun taka lawm a ni a. MSSC President, Sports & Youth Services Minister ni bawk chu khuallian niin, Mizoram Chief Minister hlui Pu Lal Thanhawla, MSSC President hlui MLA ni lai mek Pu Robert Romawia Royte, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua MLA, Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga MLA, MSSC President hluite Pu Zodintluanga Ralte, Pu Lalrinsanga leh Pu Rualchhina bakah sawm bik mi pawimawh tak takte, MSSC hnuaia affiliated State –level Sports Association hrang hrang aiawhte an tel a ni.

Golden Jubilee lawmna Inkhawmah hian khuallian MSSC President Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan kalkawmte chu nMSSC golden jubilee chibai bukin duhsakna a hlan a, MSSC hruaitu hmasa thahnemngai taktakte thawhrim rah ropui tak vawiinah hian kan tel a ni a ti a, golden jubilee kan lawm rual hian kum 50 lo awm leh tur, centenary hmel kan hmuh hun atana kan hmathlirte hi kan ngai pawimawh dawn a ni a ti a. Mizo zingah infiammi tha tak tak kan nei tawh a, chutih rualin international chu sawi loh national levelah pawh kan hlawhtlinna hi a la beitham hle a, tan kan lak nasat a ngai a, theihtawp chhuah kan tum a, tum mumal tak nen hmalam pana ke pen kan tum a ni a ti a. Kalphung tha zawk leh felfai zawk a awm theihna theihtawp an chhuah thu sawiin thurawn pawh an lak theih reng thu a sawi. Mizoram leilungfate zingah Olympian pahnih chauh kan la awm chu tlawmngaihthlak a tih thu sawiin India ramin kum 2036-ah Olympic thlen a tum a, hemi hun a lo thlen hi chuan Mizo thalaite thahnem tak India ram aiawha an tel theihna turin hmathlir mumal tak nen hma an lak mek thu a sawi a, olympic a hlawhtlinna kan hmuh theihna tur ni a an hriat sports discipline 8 thlan bik an neih thu leh theihtawp chhuaha hma an lak thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Mizoram State Sports Council (MSSC) hi April ni 20, 1976 khan Executive Order hmanga din a ni a, The Mizoram State Sports Council Act, 2002 hmangin inrelbawlna leh kalphung mumal zawka tihchangtlun a ni. Tun dinhmunah MSSC hnuaiah hian State level Sports Association 34 an inziaklut a, Jubilee pual hian kum khat chhungin Sports Association tin hian Mizoram pum huap tournament pakhat theuh hlawhtling takin an buatsaih tawh nghe nghe a ni. Mizoram State Sports Council member hmasa ber (1976) te chu : President : Dr. H. Thansanga, Education Minister

Vice- President : Pu Lal ThanhawlaSecretary : Pu Zolura, Special Officer for Scouts & Guides and Youth Welfare ActivitiesTreasurer : Pu J. Lalduhawma, State Social Education OfficerMembers : Pu Hranthanga, Deputy Director, School EducationPu L. Pachhunga, ADCPu SH Pautu, Lecturer, Pachhunga University CollegePu C. Khenglawt, DGPPu KL Rochama, MLAPu H. Rozika, Addl Secretary, Finance

The Mizoram State Sports Council Act, 2002 chuan Sports & Youth Services Minister apiang chu ex-officio President atan a ruat a, Secretary leh Finance Secretary hi sawrkarin a ruat a, Vice-President leh Joint Secretary te hi MSSC member zing atangin thlan chhuah an ni.

MSSC Golden Jubilee pual hian April ni 22, 2025 khan khan Golden Jubilee Torch (meichher) Relay neih a ni a, Bawngkawn atanga tanin Sports Association 34 aiawh ten Aizawl khawpui chhungah meichher inpe chhawngin, Sports Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, MFA President ni bawk chuan Aizawl Tennis Court ah a tlan luh pui a, inkhawm tawite neih zui a ni.

Golden Jubilee lawmna inkhawmah hian MSSC hruaitu hluite leh hruaitu ni mekte chawimawina hlan an ni a, national level chin chunglama Mizoram tana hlawhtlinna changte chawimawina hlan niin, MSSC Award sem nghal a ni bawk.

Golden Jubilee lawmna inkhawmah hian Pu V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, SYS chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, MSSC Secretary Pu Henry Lalrawnkima’n report a pe a, Dr. Lalhmuchhuaka, Vice-President, MSSC-in lawmthu sawina in a khar a ni.

MSSC hnuaia Sports Council in affiliate te chu a hnuaiah hian tarlan a ni :

1. Aquatics Association of Mizoram2. Archery Association of Mizoram3. Mizoram Arm Wrestling Association4. Mizoram Athletics Association5. Mizoram Badminton Association6. Mizoram Basketball Association7. Body Building and Fitness Association of Mizoram8. Mizoram Boxing Association9. Mizoram Carrom Association10. Mizoram Chess Association11. Mizoram Cycling Association12. Cricket Association of Mizoram13. Mizoram Fencing Association14. Mizoram Football Association15. Hockey Mizoram16. Mizoram Indigenous Games Association17. Mizoram Judo Association18. All Mizoram karate Association19. Mizoram Kickboxing Association20. Mizoram Motorsports Association21. Muay Thai Association of Mizoram22. Mizoram Powerlifting Association23. Mizoram Rifle Association24. Mizoram Sepak Takraw Association25. Mizoram Snooker & Billiards Association26. Mizoram Table Tennis Association27. Mizoram Amateur Taekwondo Association28. Mizoram Tennis Association29. Mizoram Tug of War Association30. Mizoram Volleyball Association31. Mizoram Weightlifting Association32. Mizoram Wrestling Association33. Mizoram Wushu Association34. Mizoram Paragliding Association
